title: elaphoglossum tamandarei
intro: Elaphoglossum tamandarei, also known as the "Furry Lip Fern", is a species of epiphytic fern native to the tropical regions of South America. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum tamandarei are said to include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. Elaphoglossum tamandarei can be prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, or it can be used in the form of a tincture or extract for medicinal purposes.
